sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86688" key="proapostu/fw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-στύφω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n86688.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apply an astringent first,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
